title: Christmas Music Pack + Legacy Festive Pack
description: This is a project that adds popular music in Minecraft, as well as a custom legacy Christmas Panorama! Merry Christmas! As well as Legacy Festive Textures!
body: This is a christmas music reasource pack, it adds songs that play at random, the songs aren't dependent on biome, dimension or anything, and just simply replace the songs and play these instead. Hope you enjoy this festive pack
